HOME.HERO_SUBTITLE: Here's what's happening at AMIC today.
HOME.ANN_1_BODY: Planned maintenance on Sunday, April 27 from 10 PM – 2 AM. Some services may be unavailable.
HOME.ANN_2_BODY: Working hours have been adjusted to 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM throughout the holy month.
HOME.ANN_3_BODY: Q1 performance self-assessments are now open. Please submit by May 15.
HOME.ANN_4_BODY: The updated Remote Work Policy is now available in the Policies section.
